name: Tile Scoring Engine
description: CScoreTile ported to TileScorer.swift. Three modes: Standard (Euclidean), Stronger (perceptual weighted), Weaker (Manhattan). 4x4 sub-grid scoring.
port_notes: Swift TaskGroup + Metal GPU fallback. scoreTilesConcurrent() for parallel scoring.

name: Metal GPU Scoring
description: GPU-accelerated tile distance computation via Metal compute shader. CRITICAL: MetalTileScorer is fully implemented but MosaicBuilder uses TileScorer (CPU) directly — GPU path is dead code.
port_notes: MetalTileScorer.swift with runtime-compiled TileScoring.metal. CPU fallback via TileScorer. INTEGRATION GAP: MosaicBuilder must be updated to use MetalTileScorer when GPU is available.

name: Mosaic Builder (6 patterns)
description: Grid computation for all 6 patterns: landscape, portrait, parquet, mixed, cinescope, square. Variable-width rows for parquet/mixed.
original: 5 separate .exe files (AndreaMosaic.exe, Cinescope, DSLR, Square, Menu)
port_notes: Single MosaicBuilder actor handles all patterns. xorshift64 PRNG for deterministic mixed pattern.

name: Color Adjuster
description: Per-tile color shift algorithm is correct (CIColorMatrix bias vector), but effectively a no-op at export time. TilePlacement has no targetColor field, so MosaicExporter passes tile.averageColor as both target and current — producing zero deltas.
port_notes: ColorAdjuster.swift algorithm is correct. FIX: Add targetColor to TilePlacement, populate it during MosaicBuilder.buildPlan(), and pass it through to MosaicExporter.

name: Tile Splitter
description: Adaptive 1/2 and 1/4 splitting fully implemented but never called from MosaicBuilder. splitPercentage exists in MosaicConfig but is ignored by the build pipeline.
port_notes: TileSplitter.swift is complete. INTEGRATION GAP: MosaicBuilder must call TileSplitter.selectCellsToSplit() and applySplits() when config.splitPercentage > 0.

name: Mask Processor
description: Full mask pipeline implemented but unreachable — no UI to load masks and MosaicBuilder never calls it. Grayscale PNG parsing, auto-detect *Mask.png, combineMasks AND logic all work.
port_notes: MaskProcessor.swift is complete. INTEGRATION GAP: Need mask file picker in MosaicEditorView and MosaicBuilder must call applyMask() on the plan.

name: Duplicate Control
description: DuplicateControlEngine is fully implemented but MosaicBuilder uses its own simpler inline tracking. UsageTracker, parsePriorityHashtag, and forceUnusedTiles are never called.
original: CSimpleIni settings for frame distance, duplicates
port_notes: DuplicateControlEngine.swift is complete. INTEGRATION GAP: MosaicBuilder should use DuplicateControlEngine.UsageTracker instead of inline [UUID:[Int]] tracking.

name: Image Loader (JPEG/PNG/TIFF/BMP)
description: CGImageSource with EXIF orientation correction, thumbnail generation, CMYK/Grayscale to sRGB conversion.
port_notes: ImageLoader.swift using ImageIO. All 4 formats supported.

name: Mosaic Exporter (JPEG/PNG/TIFF)
description: Banded rendering for >10,000px images. DPI metadata embedding.
port_notes: MosaicExporter.swift. 2048px bands for memory safety.

name: PSD/PSB Export
description: Full 5-section PSD/PSB with per-tile layers. Streaming 1MB chunks via FileHandle. >12GB support. Most sophisticated file in the project.
port_notes: PSDExporter.swift. PSDStreamWriter class with big-endian binary I/O. Minor gap: merged image data is white placeholder, not true composite.

name: Video Frame Extraction
description: AVAssetImageGenerator with zero tolerance. Configurable frame interval. Scene change detection.
port_notes: VideoExtractor.swift using AVFoundation.

name: Video Mosaic Export
description: AVAssetWriter with H.264/HEVC. Pixel buffer pool. MOV/MP4 containers.
port_notes: VideoMosaicExporter.swift. BGRA pixel format conversion. No UI call sites yet.

name: Web Viewer (Leaflet.js)
description: Tile pyramid + CDN Leaflet.js viewer implemented. Missing: Zoomify tile format (original uses custom leafletzoom.js with ShowAndreaMosaic()), offline bundle, search/fullscreen/easy-button plugins, base64 attribution injection.
original: webviewer/ with custom leafletzoom.js (forked by Andrea Denzler 2021), Leaflet 1.9.4, search 2.9.7, fullscreen, easy-button, Zoomify tile format
port_notes: WebMosaicExporter uses L.CRS.Simple with tiles/{z}/{x}_{y}.jpg. Original uses Zoomify format with {tileGroup}/{z}-{x}-{y}.jpg and HTML template with {HtmlTitle},{TileArrays},{MosaicUrl} tokens.

name: Tile Report
description: CSV report with usage counts and unused tiles section.
port_notes: TileReport.swift.

name: Tile Collection Manager
description: Recursive directory scan, thumbnail gen, average color, chunked processing (500/chunk).
original: Image list management in MFC dialog
port_notes: TileCollectionManager actor with autoreleasepool and AsyncStream progress.

name: Settings Store
description: @Observable class, UserDefaults persistence, JSON import/export.
port_notes: SettingsStore.swift with Codable MosaicSettings.

name: Domain Models
description: Codable + Sendable types for all domain concepts. 5 enums + 8 structs. PriorityMap defined but never populated.
port_notes: Models.swift. TileVariant selection hardcoded to .original — rotation/flip modeled but never used in build.

name: Localization (14 languages)
description: 14 GNU gettext .mo files: en, fr, de, es, it, pt, pt_BR, nl, hu, ru, uk_UA, tr_TR, zh_cn, zh_tw. Turkish locale also ships .po source.
original: locale/ directory with LC_MESSAGES/andreamosaic.mo per language + locale.txt catalog
port_notes: Need to create .xcstrings String Catalog. Extract strings from .mo files or from UI code.

name: Bundled Mask Templates
description: 7 example mask PNGs: Fluid, Poligons, Rectangles, Small Poligons, Stones with Border, Triangles, Whirl. Note: deep analysis shows masks may be stored in ~/Library/Application Support/AndreaMosaic/ at runtime.
port_notes: Copy PNGs to YJMosaic/Resources/MaskTemplates/ and add to bundle.

name: Theme Icons (default + small)
description: 24 toolbar icons (default) + 16 smaller variants.
port_notes: Replace with SF Symbols for native macOS look. No bitmap icons needed.

name: User Manual (PDF, 3 languages)
description: PDF manuals in English (3.2MB), French (3.2MB), German (3.0MB).
port_notes: Consider Help Book (.help bundle) or in-app onboarding instead.

name: Leaflet.js Plugins (bundled)
description: Original bundles custom leafletzoom.js (forked Zoomify plugin by Andrea Denzler 2021), leaflet-search 2.9.7, Control.FullScreen, easy-button, plus image assets (loader.gif, search-icon, fullscreen icons, markers).
port_notes: WebMosaicExporter uses CDN Leaflet only. Need: Zoomify format, offline bundle, search, fullscreen, easy-button plugins.

name: Credits & License Files
description: credits.txt (105KB — detailed license texts for ALL bundled open-source libraries) and license.txt (5.5KB freeware license with attribution requirement).
port_notes: Need equivalent attribution file for Apple frameworks used.

name: Update Checker
description: HTTP check to andreaplanet.com using package.txt [Package] metadata (Package=Mac, Build=Beta). NSAllowsArbitraryLoads=true for HTTP.
port_notes: URLSession implementation. Could use Sparkle framework for native macOS update checking.

name: Menu Launcher
description: MainMenuView exists as NavigationSplitView shell but 'New Mosaic' shows 'Coming Soon' text. MosaicEditorView is never instantiated from navigation.
original: AndreaMosaicMenu.exe launcher selecting between 4 engine variants
port_notes: MainMenuView must instantiate MosaicEditorView when 'New Mosaic' is selected. Pattern selection replaces variant EXEs.

name: DSLR Preset Mode
description: Separate DSLR-optimized variant (AndreaMosaicDSLR.exe). Uses high-res tile processing defaults.
port_notes: Implement as a preset in SettingsStore with high-res defaults.

name: GigaPan Integration
description: GigaPan deep-zoom gigapixel integration.
port_notes: WebMosaicExporter provides Leaflet deep-zoom. GigaPan upload would need API integration.

name: Social Sharing
description: Social sharing from toolbar.
port_notes: NSSharingServicePicker for native macOS sharing sheet.

name: Donate Button
description: Donation link in toolbar.
port_notes: Not applicable for YJMosaic (different authorship). Skip.

name: About Dialog
description: About dialog with version info and credits.
port_notes: SwiftUI About window with app info, version, credits, framework attributions.

name: MosaicBuilder Integration (real build)
description: MosaicEditorView.startBuild() simulates a fake 2-second progress animation (20x100ms delays). Does NOT call MosaicBuilder. Explicit comment: 'simulated'.
original: Fully integrated build pipeline in AndreaMosaic.exe
port_notes: Wire: MosaicBuilder.buildPlan() -> ColorAdjuster (with real targetColor) -> MosaicExporter. All engine components exist and are algorithmically complete.

name: Tile Collection UI Integration
description: TileCollectionView is fully implemented but not embedded in MosaicEditorView or MainMenuView. TileCollectionManager is not instantiated. Controls show static 'No tiles loaded' text.
original: MFC dialog with tile list, add/remove directly connected
port_notes: Embed TileCollectionView in MosaicEditorView sidebar. Create shared TileCollectionManager instance. Wire import/remove callbacks.

name: Export Dialog (real export)
description: PreviewView.beginExport() opens NSSavePanel then shows alert: 'Export requires full mosaic build.' Does not call MosaicExporter.
original: Full export with format selection, quality, DPI
port_notes: MosaicExporter is fully implemented. Wire NSSavePanel result -> MosaicExporter.export(plan:to:).

name: ICU Unicode Support
description: Foundation framework provides full Unicode support natively. No action needed.
port_notes: Covered by Foundation. No port work required.

name: Color Histogram (Metal)
description: ColorHistogram.metal listed in architecture but does not exist as a file. Could enhance tile collection analytics.
port_notes: Optional enhancement. TileScorer handles color distance. Histogram would add collection-level analytics.

name: Settings View (real controls)
description: SettingsView.swift body is: Text("Settings").frame(width: 400, height: 300). No form controls.
original: Full settings dialog with all mosaic parameters
port_notes: SettingsStore has all parameters as @Observable. Wire Form with controls for every MosaicSettings field.

name: WKWebView Preview
description: In-app Leaflet.js mosaic preview using WKWebView.
original: Not in original (web viewer is standalone HTML)
port_notes: Add WKWebView wrapper in PreviewView to preview generated web mosaics inline.

name: Undo/Redo (Tile Swaps)
description: No undo/redo for manual tile swaps in preview.
port_notes: SwiftUI UndoManager integration with MosaicPlan mutations.

name: TileVariant Selection
description: TileVariant enum defines 5 variants (original, rotated90, rotated180, flippedVertical, mirrored) but MosaicBuilder hardcodes .original for every placement. Rotation/flip never selected during build.
original: Tile rotation and flipping options in settings
port_notes: MosaicBuilder should evaluate variants when settings.allowRotation/allowFlip are true. Score each variant and pick best match.

name: Native File Dialog (macOS)
description: NSOpenPanel and NSSavePanel used directly in SwiftUI views. No need for the nested Qt5 helper app (AndreaMosaicOpen.app) that the Wineskin wrapper required.
original: Nested Qt5 macOS app (AndreaMosaicOpen.app with QtCore/QtGui/QtWidgets 5, image format plugins) inside Wine prefix
port_notes: Native macOS — no port needed. NSOpenPanel/NSSavePanel are first-class citizens.

name: Zoomify Tile Format
description: Original uses custom Zoomify tile format ({tileGroup}/{z}-{x}-{y}.jpg) via forked leafletzoom.js with ShowAndreaMosaic() entrypoint and base64-encoded attribution. Current port uses L.CRS.Simple with tiles/{z}/{x}_{y}.jpg.
original: Custom leafletzoom.js (Andrea Denzler fork 2021) with Zoomify protocol
port_notes: Update WebMosaicExporter to generate Zoomify-compatible tile layout and embed the full viewer template with search, fullscreen, and easy-button plugins.
